word: H6994 - קָטֹן - qâṭôn - kaw-tone' - Be a small

sections.paragraph:
Original: קטן

Transliteration: qâṭôn

Phonetic: kaw-tone'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be small, be insignificant
    1. (Qal) to be insignificant
    2. (Hiphil) to make small, reduce significantly

Origin: a primitive root [rather denominative from H6996]

TWOT entry: 2009

Part(s) of speech: Verb
